index.description: The index of the choice in the list of choices.

message.description: The chat completion message generated by the model.

finish_reason.description: The reason the model stopped generating tokens. stop means the model hit a natural stop point or provided stop sequence. length means the maximum token count was reached. tool_calls means the model called a tool. content_filter means content was omitted due to a flag from content filters.

logprobs.description: Log probability information for the choice.
